channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺☢️ US in talks to expand nuclear weapons deployments in Europe
item.description: The US is discussing expanding nuclear weapons deployments to additional NATO member states beyond the current six countries, with Poland and Baltic states under consideration for hosting dual-capable aircraft as talks continue through NATO channels.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱⚠️ Trump blasts Netanyahu over Lebanon escalation, blocks Beirut strike
item.description: US President Donald Trump sharply criticized Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu over Israel's military escalation in Lebanon and blocked a planned strike on Beirut, according to Al Arabiya. The report comes amid heightened regional tensions as ceasefire negotiations continue.

item.title: 🇫🇷🍇🌳 French winemakers embrace vitiforestry to combat climate change
item.description: Winegrowers across France are experimenting with growing trees alongside vines, reviving an ancient practice to protect grapes from heatwaves, drought and increasingly violent weather patterns driven by climate change.

item.title: 🇲🇾🇳🇴🚀 Malaysia demands Norway expedite refund for cancelled missile deal
item.description: Malaysia's Defense Minister urged Norway to speed up the refund for a cancelled Naval Strike Missile system after Norway refused to approve the export licence. Malaysia is now exploring alternatives from Italy, France and South Korea.

item.title: 🇵🇭📉 Philippine President Marcos approval rating hits record low
item.description: Ferdinand Marcos Jr's net satisfaction rating fell to minus 15, the worst of his presidency, as inflation driven by the Iran war and economic anxieties continue to bite. His rating collapsed across all regions, with Mindanao hitting minus 40.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚠️ Iran Suspends US Negotiations Over Israeli Attacks in Lebanon
item.description: Iran stops diplomatic message exchanges with the US through mediators, citing continued Israeli attacks in Lebanon. Tehran warns it may block the Strait of Hormuz as the three-month conflict continues.

item.title: 🇹🇼🤖 Taiwan Develops Robot Patrol Dogs for South China Sea Islands
item.description: Taiwan's military weapons institute reveals robot patrol dogs for potential deployment on disputed South China Sea islands, as Chinese coast guard patrols intensify near Taiwanese-held territories.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China and US Hold Constructive Military Talks in Hawaii
item.description: Chinese and US military officials met in Hawaii for candid discussions on air and maritime safety, agreeing that improved communication could reduce miscalculations and enhance professionalism amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇫🇷💰 France Secures €93 Billion in Foreign Investments at Choose France Summit
item.description: France announces 71 foreign investment projects worth €93 billion ($108.3 billion) at its annual business summit, creating over 15,600 jobs as Macron courts global investors.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Agrees to Ceasefire With Israel, Trump Announces
item.description: Lebanon confirmed Hezbollah accepted a US proposal for a mutual cessation of attacks, with Israel agreeing not to strike Beirut. However, clashes continued hours after the announcement, with Hezbollah launching attacks on Israeli tanks. Iran warned that violations in Lebanon would breach the broader US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱 Iran-US War: Trump Pressures Both Sides as Fighting Continues
item.description: As the conflict enters its third month, Trump faces the challenge of balancing pressure on Iran while restraining Israel from escalating the Lebanon front. The Washington Post examines the complex diplomatic negotiations and the difficulties of ending the war.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 Macau Banks Join mBridge Digital Currency Platform
item.description: Eleven Macau banks signed onto the mBridge digital currency platform, with the city joining the cross-border payment system as China pushes forward with its digital currency internationalization efforts.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚗 China's SAIC Plans First EU Car Plant in Spain's Galicia
item.description: China's largest automaker SAIC Motor plans to build its first European factory in Spain's Galicia region, as Chinese EV makers accelerate their expansion into European markets despite trade tensions.

item.title: 🇩🇰 Denmark's Prime Minister Secures Third Term After Marathon Talks
item.description: Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen secured a third term after extended coalition negotiations, as Denmark navigates complex political dynamics amid European security concerns.

item.title: 🇨🇳✈️ Why China and Other Powers Still Want Aircraft Carriers
item.description: Despite the rise of hypersonic missiles and drones, major powers including China continue investing in aircraft carriers as symbols of power projection and flexible military capability in an era of great power competition.

item.title: 🇺🇦🤖 Ukraine's Robots Are Winning the War Against Russia
item.description: Ukrainian startups are developing autonomous sea drones and robotic trucks to counter Russian forces, with innovations in unmanned systems giving Ukraine a technological edge in the ongoing conflict.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Apologizes for Catholic Church's Role in Slavery
item.description: Pope Francis formally apologized for the Catholic Church's historical role in slavery, calling it a grave sin, as the Vatican confronts its colonial past and the ongoing impact on affected communities.

item.title: 🇺🇸💸 Trump Targets Interest Rates Amid Debt and Deficit Pressures
item.description: President Trump is pushing for lower interest rates as the US grapples with mounting debt and deficit pressures, with implications for monetary policy and the broader economy.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Iran-US War Live: Netanyahu Calls Off Lebanon Raid After Trump Call
item.description: Israel's prime minister reportedly canceled a planned Beirut strike following a heated call with Trump, as the US pushes to end the conflict while managing regional escalations.

item.title: 🛢️ Goldman Sachs Expects Elevated Fuel Margins Through 2026 on Hormuz Risk
item.description: Goldman Sachs projects refined fuel margins will remain high through 2026 as the Strait of Hormuz disruption continues, with supply chain adjustments taking time to materialize.

item.title: 🇳🇴 Norway Oil Sector Workers Threaten Strike for June 5
item.description: Norwegian oil workers are threatening industrial action starting June 5, potentially adding to global energy supply pressures amid ongoing Middle East disruptions.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea's Kakao Union Plans Partial Strike for June 10
item.description: Kakao's union plans partial strikes starting June 10, adding to labor tensions in South Korea's tech sector amid broader economic pressures.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️ Defense Secretary Appeals Transgender Military Ban Ruling
item.description: The Defense Secretary is appealing a court ruling that blocked the military's transgender service ban, as the legal battle over transgender troops continues.

item.title: 🇹🇼✈️ Taiwan Reports Two Dead in Military Training Plane Crash
item.description: Two people were killed when a Taiwanese military training plane crashed, the island's defense ministry confirmed, marking another aviation incident for Taiwan's armed forces.

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Large Pillar of Smoke Seen in Kyiv After Air Raid Alert
item.description: Russian strikes hit Kyiv, causing major damage and sending thick smoke into the sky as air defenses responded to incoming threats. Residents were urged to stay in shelters amid continued attacks.
